case_title: JEFFREY RYAN SMITH VS. JEB N KNIGHT

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY RYAN SMITH IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEB N. KNIGHT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: HENRY SHAIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,451.61 FILED BY SMITH, JEFFREY RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT KNIGHT, JEB N ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2017 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUN-09-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY RYAN SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEB N. KNIGHT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
